channel.title: Home on Aayrix
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Aayrix

item.title: How to Install Ubuntu — Complete Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: A complete Ubuntu installation guide: download ISO, create a bootable USB, run the installer, partition your disk, and set up your system after first boot.

item.title: GitHub — Full Install & Usage Guide with All Commands
item.description: Complete guide to installing Git, configuring GitHub, SSH keys, cloning repos, branching, committing, pushing, and collaborating on GitHub.

item.title: How to Make Hugo Pages — Complete Guide with All Commands
item.description: Learn to install Hugo, create pages and posts, configure your site, build for production, and deploy to GitHub Pages with copy-paste commands.

item.title: GitHub CLI (gh) — Complete Guide with Copy-Paste Commands
item.description: Install GitHub CLI on Linux, authenticate with GitHub, and manage repos, issues, pull requests, and releases from the terminal.

item.title: How to Install Arch Linux — Complete Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: A complete Arch Linux installation guide: download ISO, partition disks, install base system, configure bootloader, and set up a desktop environment.

item.title: Welcome to Aayrix — Developer Guides & Tutorials
item.description: An introduction to this blog: Linux guides, GitHub workflows, Hugo tutorials, and copy-paste commands for developers.

item.title: About
item.description: About Aayrix — developer, blogger, and open-source enthusiast.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Get in touch with Aayrix via GitHub.
